accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text or accurate context (DOE/CESER administers the program under IIJA Section 40125(c)).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Department of Energy administration and IIJA amendment are accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes and expands the DOE Energy Sector Operational Support for Cyberresilience Program.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the amendment to Section 40125(c) of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the sole/unreviewable discretion, no-right-or-benefit, FACA nonapplicability, and FOIA disclosure exemptions.

effective_dates.why: Accurately notes the appropriations period change from FY2022-2026 to FY2027-2031 and the introduction/reporting dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures new purposes, the Energy Threat Analysis Center, procedural provisions, transaction authority, and reauthorization.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent with logical flow.

concise.why: Detailed but free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names DOE, the Secretary, IIJA, FACA, FOIA, and the Energy Threat Analysis Center.

correct_figures.why: The fiscal year periods (2022-2026 to 2027-2031) and dates are stated correctly.
